agency_rationale: Subject is entirely passive: can't speak, trembling, calls herself a fool. All agency belongs to the boy.
tone_rationale: Shy, flustered, self-deprecating — heart racing and unable to act. Soft vulnerability.
appearance_rationale: References to dazzling eyes and scent describe the boy, not self-appearance. Minimal self-focus.
label_style_rationale: Quintessential aegyo/cute concept: shy girl overwhelmed by crush, childlike emotional register.
